--- title: "Dr. Jayaruwani Fernando - Research & Scholarship" include-in-header: text: | <meta name="google-site-verification" content="UtUiOLPOW8uolVxjq_6Qox7rnJfIODmKCpN7YBvW8nk" />
---

## About Me
![](profile.png){width="200" style="border-radius: 50%;"}

I am a **Senior Lecturer in Agricultural Engineering** at Rajarata University of Sri Lanka, with over 13 years of experience. My research focuses on agricultural machinery, postharvest technology, and sustainable drying systems.

[🔗 Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oKLbNdEAAAAJ) | [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2292-547X) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jayaruwani-fernando-89310a49/)

---

## Research Focus

- Agricultural Machinery & Mechanization
- Postharvest Technology & Drying Systems  
- Heat Pump Drying Optimization
- IoT-enabled Control Systems

---

## Key Awards

- Outstanding Doctoral Research Award – Gold Medal (2025)
- Vice Chancellor's Award – Highest Citations (2024)
- Vice Chancellor's Award – Most Outstanding Young Researcher (2022)

---

## Patent

- **Granted:** Bund plastering & canal making machine (Patent: 20513, 2022)

---

[View my complete CV →](cv.html)
